# Design Spec Template

- `Title:`
- `Background / Problem Context:`
- `Goals:`
- `Non-Goals:`
- `Personas / User Segments:`
- `User Flows:` (primary and edge flows)
- `Interaction States:` (`Loading`, `Empty`, `Error`, `Offline/Degraded`)
- `Accessibility Requirements:` (WCAG level, keyboard, screen reader, contrast)
- `Content / UX Copy Notes:`
- `Telemetry & UX Success Signals:`
- `Dependencies:`
- `Risks and Mitigations:`
- `Handoff Notes:` (design assets, tokens, component references)
- `Source References:`
- `Readiness Verdict: Ready | Needs Refinement`
- `Failed Gates:` (required when `Needs Refinement`)
- `Missing Sources:` (required when grounding is incomplete)
